data.en: Perhaps you've always thought that travelling is something for rich people.
data.cn: 也许你一直认为旅行是有钱人的事。
data.hint: 用'always'表示一直以来的想法。
accept: Travelling is something for rich people, perhaps you've always thought.

data.en: Nora is one of a new kind of traveller.
data.cn: 诺拉是新一代旅行者中的一员。
data.hint: 'one of a...' 表示'...中的一个'。
accept: One of a new kind of traveller is Nora.

data.en: Nora is from Toronto, Canada and she had a business there.
data.cn: 诺拉来自加拿大多伦多，她在那里有一家公司。
data.hint: 过去时表示过去的状态。
accept: Nora is from Canada, Toronto and she had a business there.
She had a business there and Nora is from Toronto, Canada.

data.en: Her dream was to travel the world before she got old.
data.cn: 她的梦想是在变老之前环游世界。
data.hint: 'before' 引导时间状语从句。
accept: Before she got old, her dream was to travel the world.

data.en: She sold her business and got rid of her belongings.
data.cn: 她卖掉了她的公司，处理掉了她的财产。
data.hint: 短语 'get rid of' 表示处理、摆脱。
accept: She got rid of her belongings and sold her business.

data.en: Nora hasn't got rich parents or anyone who gives her money.
data.cn: 诺拉没有有钱的父母，也没有任何人给她钱。
data.hint: hasn't got 表示没有。
accept: Nora hasn't got anyone who gives her money or rich parents.

data.en: She doesn't have a high-paying job.
data.cn: 她没有高薪工作。
data.hint: doesn't have 表示没有（现在时）。

data.en: She's learned how to travel without spending lots of money.
data.cn: 她学会了如何在不花很多钱的情况下旅行。
data.hint: 'without' 后面接动名词形式。
accept: Without spending lots of money, she's learned how to travel.

data.en: She works to earn enough money to have a good time.
data.cn: 她工作是为了赚足够的钱玩得开心。
data.hint: enough + 名词 + 不定式。
accept: To have a good time, she works to earn enough money.

data.en: She prefers simple forms of transport like trains or buses.
data.cn: 她更喜欢简单的交通方式，比如火车或公共汽车。
data.hint: 'like' 在这里表示举例。
accept: She prefers simple forms of transport like buses or trains.

data.en: She's been to all five continents and over thirty countries.
data.cn: 她去过所有五个大洲和三十多个国家。
data.hint: have been to 表示去过的经历。
accept: She's been to over thirty countries and all five continents.

data.en: She's taken a train across Canada in six years.
data.cn: 六年时间里，她乘火车横穿了加拿大。
data.hint: 现在完成时表示过去六年的经历。
accept: In six years she's taken a train across Canada.

data.en: She's travelled by train from Portugal to Vietnam.
data.cn: 她乘火车从葡萄牙旅行到了越南。
data.hint: from ... to ... 表示从某地到某地。
accept: From Portugal to Vietnam she's travelled by train.

data.en: She's lived on a boat in the Caribbean.
data.cn: 她曾在加勒比海的一艘船上生活过。
data.hint: 在船上用介词 'on'。
accept: In the Caribbean she's lived on a boat.

data.en: She's worked for her accommodation in many different places.
data.cn: 她在许多不同的地方通过工作来换取住宿。
data.hint: work for something 为...工作。
accept: In many different places she's worked for her accommodation.

data.en: She's been on television shows in three countries.
data.cn: 她在三个国家上过电视节目。
data.hint: 上电视节目用介词 'on'。
accept: In three countries she's been on television shows.

data.en: She's had a lot of fantastic adventures.
data.cn: 她有很多奇妙的冒险经历。
data.hint: have 的过去分词是 had。

data.en: She helped people in Thailand after a cyclone hit.
data.cn: 旋风袭击后，她帮助了泰国人民。
data.hint: 过去时表示过去发生的具体事件。
accept: After a cyclone hit, she helped people in Thailand.

data.en: She helped to fight forest fires in Australia.
data.cn: 她在澳大利亚协助扑灭森林大火。
data.hint: help to do sth. 帮助做某事。
accept: In Australia she helped to fight forest fires.

data.en: Full-time travel doesn't have to be expensive.
data.cn: 全职旅行并不一定要很贵。
data.hint: doesn't have to 表示不需要，不必。

data.en: Diane hasn't visited Paris but she has written a book.
data.cn: 黛安没去过巴黎，但她写过一本书。
data.hint: 现在完成时的否定和肯定形式。
accept: But she has written a book, Diane hasn't visited Paris.

data.en: Jack has learned French and he has made lots of money.
data.cn: 杰克学过法语，而且他赚了很多钱。
data.hint: learned 是 learn 的过去分词形式之一。
accept: Jack has made lots of money and he has learned French.

data.en: Jack and Diane have both learned how to speak French.
data.cn: 杰克和黛安都学会了如何说法语。
data.hint: both 表示两者都。
accept: Jack and Diane both have learned how to speak French.

data.en: Sue has visited another country but she hasn't flown.
data.cn: 苏去过另一个国家，但她还没坐过飞机。
data.hint: another 用于单数名词前。
accept: But she hasn't flown, Sue has visited another country.

data.en: Harry hasn't taken a driving test but he has visited France.
data.cn: 哈里还没参加过驾照考试，但他去过法国。
data.hint: take a test 参加考试。
accept: But he has visited France, Harry hasn't taken a driving test.

data.en: She has gone to New York and she is there now.
data.cn: 她去纽约了，她现在在那里。
data.hint: has gone to 表示去了还没回来。
accept: She is there now and she has gone to New York.

data.en: She has been to New York and she came back.
data.cn: 她去过纽约，然后回来了。
data.hint: has been to 表示去过并已回来。
accept: She came back and she has been to New York.

data.en: My mother has lived in Africa for many years.
data.cn: 我母亲在非洲生活了很多年。
data.hint: 现在完成时表示动作持续了一段时间。
accept: For many years my mother has lived in Africa.

data.en: I've won two tennis competitions at my school.
data.cn: 我在学校赢得了两场网球比赛。
data.hint: I've 是 I have 的缩写。
accept: At my school I've won two tennis competitions.

data.en: Have you ever seen a snake in the wild?
data.cn: 你在野外见过蛇吗？
data.hint: ever 常用于疑问句，表示“曾经”。
accept: In the wild have you ever seen a snake?

data.en: I've never been a person who stays at home.
data.cn: 我从来不是一个待在家里的人。
data.hint: never 用于现在完成时，表示“从未”。
accept: A person who stays at home, I've never been.

data.en: Even when I was young, I cycled to other places.
data.cn: 即使在我年轻的时候，我也骑自行车去其他地方。
data.hint: even when 表示“即使当...的时候”。
accept: I cycled to other places even when I was young.

data.en: I've always loved travelling and I never want to stop.
data.cn: 我一直热爱旅行，我永远不想停下来。
data.hint: 注意 travelling 的拼写（英式）。
accept: I never want to stop and I've always loved travelling.

data.en: You really have been to a lot of different places.
data.cn: 你真的去过很多不同的地方。
data.hint: 副词 really 放在助动词后、实义动词前。
accept: Really you have been to a lot of different places.

data.en: What is the best place you've ever been to?
data.cn: 你去过的最好的地方是哪里？
data.hint: 最高级 + ever + 现在完成时。

data.en: The people there are wonderful and it's so beautiful too.
data.cn: 那里的人很好，而且也非常美丽。
data.hint: wonderful 和 beautiful 都是形容词。
accept: It's so beautiful too and the people there are wonderful.

data.en: It was very interesting because of its history.
data.cn: 因为它的历史，它非常有趣。
data.hint: because of 后面接名词短语。
accept: Because of its history, it was very interesting.

data.en: I've never eaten snake but I've eaten some strange things.
data.cn: 我从来没吃过蛇，但我吃过一些奇怪的东西。
data.hint: some 用于肯定句，修饰复数名词。
accept: But I've eaten some strange things, I've never eaten snake.

data.en: Once in Africa I ate a cooked spider.
data.cn: 有一次在非洲我吃了一只煮熟的蜘蛛。
data.hint: once 表示“曾经一次”，用过去时。
accept: I ate a cooked spider once in Africa.
In Africa once I ate a cooked spider.

data.en: I was ill once in India but nothing too bad.
data.cn: 我在印度生过一次病，但并不太严重。
data.hint: too bad 表示太糟糕，用于程度加强。
accept: But nothing too bad, I was ill once in India.

data.en: She's seen many countries so she understands all kinds of people.
data.cn: 她去过许多国家，所以她理解各种各样的人。
data.hint: so 表示结果。
accept: So she understands all kinds of people, she's seen many countries.

data.en: She's probably a better person now because she's learned things.
data.cn: 她现在可能是一个更好的人，因为她学到了很多东西。
data.hint: better 是 good 的比较级。
accept: Because she's learned things, she's probably a better person now.

data.en: It's wonderful what she did in Burma with the cyclone.
data.cn: 她在缅甸应对旋风所做的事情很了不起。
data.hint: It's ... what ... 结构。
accept: What she did in Burma with the cyclone is wonderful.

data.en: She's living her life without thinking about money all the time.
data.cn: 她过着自己的生活，不去一直考虑钱的事。
data.hint: without 后面接动名词形式。
accept: Without thinking about money all the time, she's living her life.

data.en: Travel broadens the mind and helps us learn about cultures.
data.cn: 旅行开阔眼界，帮助我们了解不同的文化。
data.hint: broaden the mind 是固定搭配，意为开阔眼界。
accept: Helps us learn about cultures and travel broadens the mind.

data.en: Have you ever watched a silent film at the cinema?
data.cn: 你在电影院看过默片吗？
data.hint: at the cinema 在电影院。
accept: At the cinema have you ever watched a silent film?

data.en: I have never been to the Olympic games.
data.cn: 我从来没有去过奥运会。
data.hint: been to 表示去过的经历。

data.en: Have you ever eaten anything really horrible?
data.cn: 你有没有吃过什么非常恶心的东西？
data.hint: anything 用于疑问句。

data.en: Tourists take suitcases with them but travellers take backpacks.
data.cn: 游客随身带手提箱，但旅行者带背包。
data.hint: 复数名词表示泛指。
accept: Travellers take backpacks but tourists take suitcases with them.

data.en: It isn't so easy to see the travellers in a city.
data.cn: 在城市里没那么容易看到旅行者。
data.hint: It is not easy to do sth. 做某事不容易。
accept: To see the travellers in a city it isn't so easy.
